title: Myrt and Marge
writer: Beatrice Banyard, Al Boasberg, Myrtle Vail
actors: Myrtle Vail, Donna Damerel, Ray Hedge
plot: Myrt has a show chock-full of talented performers who deserve to be on Broadway, but can't raise the necessary money. Jackson, a lecherous "producer", provides the money in order to get his hands on the show's pretty young star, M...
